stories.title: Middle East crisis live: Trump extends pause on energy site strikes; German minister says US-Iran talks to take place ‘very soon’
stories.summary: Trump extended his deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz to April 6, while Germany's foreign minister says US-Iran peace talks will happen "very soon" in Pakistan.

stories.title: ‘My heart burns with pain’: Iranian mother tells UN of Minab school attack
stories.summary: Iranian mother Mohaddeseh Fallahat told the UN Human Rights Council about losing two children in the Minab school attack, alongside Iran's foreign minister addressing the body.

stories.title: Ukraine signs deal with Saudi Arabia offering drone expertise
stories.summary: Ukraine signed a deal offering Saudi Arabia drone expertise, with Zelensky noting both countries face similar Iranian attacks.

stories.title: India lowers fuel taxes, says rumours of lockdown ‘completely false’
stories.summary: India cut fuel taxes and denied lockdown rumors as the world's third-largest crude importer scrambles with Iran war-related shortages.

stories.title: Rubio heads to Europe to try garner support for Iran war
stories.summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio heads to the G7 meeting in France today to pitch reluctant allies on supporting Trump's Iran war.

stories.title: Iran emergency workers search for survivors after deadly US-Israel attacks
stories.summary: Iran reports nearly 2,000 war dead as rescue teams search rubble from latest US-Israeli strikes that killed six in Qom.

stories.title: Saudi Arabia urging US to ramp up Iran attacks, intelligence source confirms
stories.summary: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman is privately urging the US to escalate attacks on Iran, viewing the war as a "historic opportunity" to remake the Middle East.

stories.title: Israeli opposition leader rails against ‘multi-front war without strategy’
stories.summary: Israeli opposition leader Yair Lapid slammed the government's "multi-front war without strategy," saying military forces are "stretched to the limit and beyond."

stories.title: Iran bans sports teams from travelling to ‘hostile’ countries amid war
stories.summary: Iran banned its sports teams from traveling to "hostile" countries for security reasons, affecting a scheduled game between Iranian and Emirati clubs in Saudi Arabia.

stories.title: US Treasury plans to put Trump’s signature on new paper currency in first for sitting president
stories.summary: The US Treasury plans to put Trump's signature on new paper currency, marking the first time a sitting president's signature will appear on American money.

stories.title: Somali children are ‘on the edge’ as hunger spreads. UNICEF says Iran war has worsened the crisis
stories.summary: UNICEF says the Iran war has worsened Somalia's hunger crisis, with children "on the edge" as food supply disruptions compound existing drought conditions.
